_README: Edit this file to add listings. Each entry needs either `url` (Zillow homedetails link) or `address`. `gut` is your expected verdict — STRONG BUY / GOOD DEAL / BORDERLINE / PASS / AVOID — so the harness can score matches. `label` and `notes` are free-form strings for readability.

listings.label: Hoagland, IN — known-good SFR
